# DLSSync Manifest

> Public, Ed25519-signed catalog for DLSS, FSR, XeSS, Streamline, Reflex, and DirectStorage runtime metadata.

- Catalog: https://xt0n1-t3ch.github.io/DLSSync-Manifest/manifest.json
- Detached signature: https://xt0n1-t3ch.github.io/DLSSync-Manifest/manifest.json.sig
- JSON Schema: https://xt0n1-t3ch.github.io/DLSSync-Manifest/manifest.schema.json
- Source: https://github.com/xt0n1-t3ch/DLSSync-Manifest
- Application: https://github.com/xt0n1-t3ch/DLSSync

DLSSync does not rehost runtime binaries. Catalog entries retain declared provenance, expected hashes, publisher metadata, and their upstream or community-archive download locations.
